GIVENNAME, SURNAME,
TITLE, CITY, STREET

───────────────

+ bootstrap_metric()
+ collect_inference_stats_batched()

Metric: F0.5 Score
Bootstrap: 1000 resamples
Economic: LLM vs Error cost
